prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 144 位持续上升至 2026 年第 87 位，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；2023 年曾因师德师风事件出现偏负面舆情，2024 年转为中性/混合（校区争议），2026 年声誉数据未单独列出；抖音热度总排名第 32 位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，对报考关注度有正向拉动；第五轮学科评估中海南大学未列入 A- 及以上学科名单，但学校在热带农业、海洋、法学等方向有特色优势；招生专业中计算机类、电子信息类、自动化等工科专业社会热度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与海南大学物理类招生专业高度重合，相关专业热度升温将推高报考竞争；江西省 2026 年高考总人数约 47.49 万，较 2025 年（约 47.25 万）略有增加，竞争基数扩大；海南大学位于海南省海口市，属热带滨海城市，对江西考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在江西省物理类招生规模较大（280 人左右），属于省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合软科排名持续上升带来的学校层次提升、计算机/电子信息等热门专业社会热度高、江西考生总数小幅增加等因素，预 计 2026 年物理类报考竞争较 2025 年略有加剧；同时 2026 年招生计划仅微增 1 人，供需基本平衡。，结合学校声誉提升和热门专业热度，预测最低位次约 26364 名，区间 25864–26864 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 24978→21898→19629→27482→26338. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation (from 19629 to 27482). In 2025, it slightly recovered to 26338, with the baseline in the past two years around 26300–27500. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 231→230→243→263→282, showing continuous expansion. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 283, an increase of only 1 compared to 2025, essentially flat, with limited relief from competition due to expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, a significant improvement, reflecting the school's comprehensive strength and growing recognition. In 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics, which turned neutral/mixed in 2024 (campus controversy). Reputation data for 2026 is not separately listed. Douyin popularity ranks 32nd overall (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, positively influencing application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University was not included in the A- or above discipline list, but the school has distinctive advantages in tropical agriculture, marine science, law, and other directions. Among the enrollment majors, computer science, electronic information, automation, and other engineering majors have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly overlapping with Hainan University's Physics Category enrollment majors. The rising popularity of related majors will increase application competition. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (about 472,500), expanding the competition base. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, a tropical coastal city, which has some regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province for Physics Category (around 280 students), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the school's level, high social popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, and a slight increase in the total number of Jiangxi candidates, it is expected that the competition for Physics Category applications in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. Meanwhile, the 2026 enrollment plan only increases by 1 person, keeping supply and demand basically balanced. Combined with the school's reputation improvement and hot major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26364, with a range of 25864–26864.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 25864–26864 are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with 1–2 Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 25000) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 hot majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (outside 26800) are advised to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
